name: okpack-indicators-feed-fetch
_note: Enabled by default but HARMLESS until you populate feeds.opml: feed-fetch runs on schedule and makes ZERO upstream calls while the feed list is empty (it logs a clean 'no feeds' no-op). Populate feeds/feeds.opml to start ingesting. The `@jitter:2h` schedule is expanded to a concrete cron with a RANDOM minute at install (framework init/pull), so installs don't synchronize once feeds are live.
prompt: okpack-indicators feed pull: fetch the indicators OPML into raw/indicators/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-indicators-urlhaus-import
_note: THE seed. Pulls the abuse.ch URLhaus recent-URLs feed (CC0) into indicators/ — one indicator page per malicious URL, plus an infrastructure page per distinct host. BOUNDED (recent feed, URLHAUS_LIMIT default 500). no_agent, ZERO LLM tokens, MERGE-safe. URLhaus updates continuously; hourly/daily are both reasonable.
prompt: Seed malicious-URL indicators from abuse.ch URLhaus. Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.
